hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT dis.DistrName FROM Distributor dis WHERE dis.DistrCode=:distrCode
SELECT DISTINCT cmp.CmpCode AS cmpCode, cmp.CmpName AS cmpName FROM StockOnHand SOH JOIN Company cmp ON SOH.CmpCode = cmp.CmpCode WHERE SOH.DistrBrCode IN (:distrBranches)

SELECT DISTINCT Gd.GodownCode AS godownCode, Gd.GodownName AS godownName FROM Godown Gd JOIN StockOnHand SO ON Gd.GodownCode = SO.GodownCode AND Gd.DistrCode = SO.DistrCode AND Gd.DistrBrCode = SO.DistrBrCode AND Gd.CmpCode = SO.CmpCode WHERE SO.DistrBrCode IN (:distrBranches)

SELECT DISTINCT D.DistrCode AS distrCode, D.DistrName AS distrName, DB.DistrBrCode AS distrBrCode, DB.DistrBrName AS distrBrName, G.GodownName AS godownName, GP.HSNCode AS hsncode, P.ProdCode AS prodCode, P.ProdName AS prodName, PB.ProdBatchCode AS prodBatchCode, PB.ExpiryDt AS expiryDt, PP.MRP AS mrp, PP.PurPrice AS purPrice, COALESCE((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty), 0) / (SELECT MAX(pu.UomConvFactor) FROM ProductUOM pu WHERE pu.CmpCode = P.CmpCode AND pu.ProdCode = P.ProdCode) AS saleableStock, COALESCE((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty), 0) % (SELECT MAX(pu.UomConvFactor) FROM ProductUOM pu WHERE pu.CmpCode = P.CmpCode AND pu.ProdCode = P.ProdCode) AS saleableStockLoose, (SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) AS saleableQty, (SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) AS unsaleableQty, (SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty) AS offerQty, ((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * PP.PurPrice) AS saleableStockValue, ((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * PP.PurPrice) AS unsaleableStockValue, ((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * PP.PurPrice) + ((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * PP.PurPrice) AS totalStockValue, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN ((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000) ELSE ((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt) END AS saleableWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN ((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000) ELSE ((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt) END AS unsaleableWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN ((SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000) ELSE ((SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty) * P.ProdNetWgt) END AS offerWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN (((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) + (SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) + (SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty)) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000) ELSE (((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) + (SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) + (SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty)) * P.ProdNetWgt) END AS totalWeight, P.ProdWgtType AS productWeightType, ph.ProdHierValName AS packSizeName, GP.GSTProdType AS productType, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(PB.ExpiryDt, NOW()) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE DATEDIFF(PB.ExpiryDt, NOW()) END AS daysToExpiry FROM Product P JOIN ProductBatch PB ON P.ProdCode = PB.ProdCode AND P.CmpCode = PB.CmpCode JOIN ProductPricing PP ON PB.ProdCode = PP.ProdCode AND PB.ProdBatchCode = PP.ProdBatchCode AND PB.CmpCode = PP.CmpCode JOIN GSTProduct GP ON P.ProdCode = GP.ProdCode AND P.CmpCode = GP.CmpCode JOIN SupplyChainMapping SCM ON PP.CmpCode = SCM.CmpCode AND PP.FromLevel = SCM.LevelCode AND PP.ToLevel = SCM.SellToLevelCode JOIN StockOnHand SO ON PB.ProdCode = SO.ProdCode AND PB.ProdBatchCode = SO.ProdBatchCode AND PB.CmpCode = SO.CmpCode JOIN DistributorBranch DB ON SO.DistrCode = DB.DistrCode AND SO.DistrBrCode = DB.DistrBrCode AND SO.CmpCode = DB.CmpCode JOIN Godown G ON SO.DistrCode = G.DistrCode AND SO.DistrBrCode = G.DistrBrCode AND SO.GodownCode = G.GodownCode AND SO.CmpCode = G.CmpCode JOIN Distributor D ON DB.DistrCode = D.DistrCode AND DB.CmpCode = D.CmpCode JOIN ProductHierValue ph ON P.ProdHierValCode = ph.ProdHierValCode AND P.CmpCode = ph.CmpCode WHERE DB.IsDeleted = 'N' AND PP.FromLevel IN (SELECT SCM_inner.LevelCode FROM SupplyChainMaster SCM_inner WHERE SCM_inner.MemberCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND SCM_inner.CmpCode = P.CmpCode) AND PP.ToLevel NOT IN (SELECT SCM_inner.LevelCode FROM SupplyChainMaster SCM_inner WHERE SCM_inner.MemberCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND SCM_inner.CmpCode = P.CmpCode AND SCM_inner.LevelCode > PP.FromLevel) AND SO.DistrBrCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND PP.GeoCode IN (:GEOPROD_LST) AND SO.DistrCode IN (:DISTRIBUTOR_LST) AND (SO.GodownCode IN (:GODOWN_LST) OR :GODOWN_AVL = 'N') AND P.ProdCode IN (SELECT DISTINCT p1.ProdCode FROM Product p1 JOIN LOBMaster l ON p1.CmpCode = l.CmpCode WHERE p1.ProductHierPath LIKE CONCAT('%/', l.ProdHierValCode, '/%') AND l.LobCode IN (:LOBCODE_LIST) AND (p1.ProdHierValCode IN (:PRODUCT_HIER_VALUE_LIST) OR :PRODUCT_AVL = 'N')) AND (P.IsActive = :PRODUCT_STATUS_ACTIVE_STR OR P.IsActive = :PRODUCT_STATUS_INACTIVE_STR) AND (PB.IsActive = :BATCH_STATUS_ACTIVE_STR OR PB.IsActive = :BATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_STR) AND (SO.SaleableQty + SO.UnSaleableQty + SO.OfferQty) > 0 ORDER BY D.DistrName, DB.DistrBrName, P.ProdName, PB.ProdBatchCode

SELECT DISTINCT D.DistrCode AS distrCode, D.DistrName AS distrName, DB.DistrBrCode AS distrBrCode, DB.DistrBrName AS distrBrName, G.GodownName AS godownName, GP.HSNCode AS hsncode, P.ProdCode AS prodCode, P.ProdName AS prodName, PB.ProdBatchCode AS prodBatchCode, PB.ExpiryDt AS expiryDt, PP.MRP AS mrp, PP.PurPrice AS purPrice, SUM((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty)) AS saleableQty, SUM((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty)) AS unsaleableQty, SUM((SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty)) AS offerQty, SUM(((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * PP.PurPrice)) AS saleableStockValue, SUM(((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * PP.PurPrice)) AS unsaleableStockValue, SUM(((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * PP.PurPrice) + ((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * PP.PurPrice)) AS totalStockValue, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN SUM(((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000)) ELSE SUM(((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt)) END AS saleableWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN SUM(((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000)) ELSE SUM(((SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) * P.ProdNetWgt)) END AS unsaleableWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN SUM(((SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000)) ELSE SUM(((SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty) * P.ProdNetWgt)) END AS offerWeight, CASE WHEN P.ProdWgtType = 'GM' THEN SUM((((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) + (SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) + (SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty)) * P.ProdNetWgt / 1000)) ELSE SUM((((SO.SaleableQty - SO.ResvSaleQty) + (SO.UnSaleableQty - SO.ResvUnsaleQty) + (SO.OfferQty - SO.ResvOfferQty)) * P.ProdNetWgt)) END AS totalWeight FROM Product P JOIN ProductBatch PB ON P.ProdCode = PB.ProdCode AND P.CmpCode = PB.CmpCode JOIN ProductPricing PP ON PB.ProdCode = PP.ProdCode AND PB.ProdBatchCode = PP.ProdBatchCode AND PB.CmpCode = PP.CmpCode JOIN GSTProduct GP ON P.ProdCode = GP.ProdCode AND P.CmpCode = GP.CmpCode JOIN SupplyChainMapping SCM ON PP.CmpCode = SCM.CmpCode AND PP.FromLevel = SCM.LevelCode AND PP.ToLevel = SCM.SellToLevelCode JOIN StockOnHand SO ON PB.ProdCode = SO.ProdCode AND PB.ProdBatchCode = SO.ProdBatchCode AND PB.CmpCode = SO.CmpCode JOIN DistributorBranch DB ON SO.DistrCode = DB.DistrCode AND SO.DistrBrCode = DB.DistrBrCode AND SO.CmpCode = DB.CmpCode JOIN Godown G ON SO.DistrCode = G.DistrCode AND SO.DistrBrCode = G.DistrBrCode AND SO.GodownCode = G.GodownCode AND SO.CmpCode = G.CmpCode JOIN Distributor D ON DB.DistrCode = D.DistrCode AND DB.CmpCode = D.CmpCode WHERE DB.IsDeleted = 'N' AND PP.FromLevel IN (SELECT SCM_inner.LevelCode FROM SupplyChainMaster SCM_inner WHERE SCM_inner.MemberCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND SCM_inner.CmpCode = P.CmpCode) AND PP.ToLevel NOT IN (SELECT SCM_inner.LevelCode FROM SupplyChainMaster SCM_inner WHERE SCM_inner.MemberCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND SCM_inner.CmpCode = P.CmpCode AND SCM_inner.LevelCode > PP.FromLevel) AND SO.DistrBrCode IN (:DISTR_BR_LST) AND PP.GeoCode IN (:GEOPROD_LST) AND SO.DistrCode IN (:DISTRIBUTOR_LST) AND (SO.GodownCode IN (:GODOWN_LST) OR :GODOWN_AVL = 'N') AND P.ProdCode IN (SELECT DISTINCT p1.ProdCode FROM Product p1 JOIN LOBMaster l ON p1.CmpCode = l.CmpCode WHERE p1.ProductHierPath LIKE CONCAT('%/', l.ProdHierValCode, '/%') AND l.LobCode IN (:LOBCODE_LIST) AND (p1.ProdHierValCode IN (:PRODUCT_HIER_VALUE_LIST) OR :PRODUCT_AVL = 'N')) AND (P.IsActive = :PRODUCT_STATUS_ACTIVE_STR OR P.IsActive = :PRODUCT_STATUS_INACTIVE_STR) AND (PB.IsActive = :BATCH_STATUS_ACTIVE_STR OR PB.IsActive = :BATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_STR) AND (SO.SaleableQty + SO.UnSaleableQty + SO.OfferQty) > 0 GROUP BY D.DistrCode, D.DistrName, DB.DistrBrCode, DB.DistrBrName, G.GodownName, GP.HSNCode, P.ProdCode, P.ProdName, PB.ProdBatchCode, PB.ExpiryDt, PP.MRP, PP.PurPrice, P.ProdWgtType, P.ProdNetWgt
